title: GSK walks away from $100M bet on Mersana's STING ADC, pauses mRNA bird flu shot program
summary: GSK has finally called time on its pact with Mersana Therapeutics despite sinking $100 million to secure an option for an antibody-drug conjugate (ADC).
cgt_reason: mRNA bird flu vaccine program mentioned.

title: Wave aims for monthly dosing with RNA editing treatment for AATD

title: Candel reports prostate cancer drug's long-term data ahead of FDA filing

title: Ascidian, Lilly ink RNA exon editing pact worth up to $1.9B for genetic kidney diseases
summary: Ascidian Therapeutics and Eli Lilly have signed a research collaboration potentially worth up to $1.9 billion, giving the Big Pharma company the chance to discover and develop RNA exon editing therapeutics for genetic kidney diseases.
cgt_reason: RNA exon editing therapeutics for genetic diseases

title: City aims to lay foundation for RNAi renaissance with nearly $100M series B
summary: Looking to spark an antibody-like revolution for RNA interference medicines, City Therapeutics has landed a nearly $100 million series B to fund a clinical push and power further development of its foundational platform.
